python3 << 'EOF'
import json, glob
arts=[]
for f in sorted(glob.glob('articles/2026/02/10/*.jsonl')):
    arts += [json.loads(l) for l in open(f)]
print(len(arts))
with open('memory/titles_0210.txt','w') as out:
    for a in arts: out.write(f"{a['source']} | {a['title']}\n")
EOF
grep -i -E "tractor|acl elite|asian champions" memory/titles_0210.txt | head -4; echo ---; grep -i -E "t20|pakistan.*cricket|super eight" memory/titles_0210.txt | head -6; echo ---; grep -i -E "carrier|lincoln|ford" memory/titles_0210.txt | head -4
